[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00000011 2

01 00000011 2 match 7
12 11101000 4
23 00010110 3
34 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6
45 00000000 a match 0 1 2 3 4 5 6

67 01000111 4
70 00010000 1
